title: orobanche reticulata var. pallidiflora
intro: Orobanche reticulata var. pallidiflora is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the broomrape family, characterized by its pale yellow flowers and hairy stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Orobanche reticulata var. pallidiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
